stages.description: In-scope-of-authority interventions: execute under existing delegation.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate at cycle end: cycle-time and consent records within prior variance.

stages.description: Extended-scope interventions: require explicit consent before execution.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate: consent received with documented scope-boundary acknowledgment.

stages.description: Out-of-scope interventions: refuse execution. Indefinite hold pending separate authorization process.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate for hold lift: full scope-of-authority review by independent oversight.

stages.description: Parallel mandatory documentation of all scope-boundary decisions.
stages.continuation_gate: Gate at cycle end: documentation completeness reviewed independently.
